name: gosymdb
description: Go symbol and call-graph database — replaces grep for code navigation
author: walkindude

sym.description: Find a Go symbol. Use INSTEAD of grep/rg when looking for where a function, type, or method is defined.

trace.description: Full profile of a Go symbol — definition, callers, callees, blast radius in one call. Use BEFORE reading source files.

impact.description: Check what breaks before changing a Go symbol. Use BEFORE any refactor, rename, or signature change.
